headline: FROM DATA TO DECISIONS
subheading: Turn scattered quality metrics into board-level oversight your MHRA inspector will respect.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking a senior pharmaceutical quality governance review under ICH Q10: a sleek deep-navy boardroom table surface rendered as a polished geometric plane, on which scattered translucent data fragments, fragmented bar shards and loose floating dots converge and crystallise into a single clear ascending trend curve and three interlocking rings, symbolising raw metrics aggregated into clarity and decisive oversight. A subtle glowing teal and cyan light flows along the converging data streams, with a single fresh-green accent point marking a status indicator at the decision point. Shallow depth of field, soft luminous reflections on glass and brushed metal forms, cool clinical-luxury atmosphere, uncluttered negative space, premium and trustworthy mood, conceptual visual metaphor of synthesis and accountability. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
